import graph; size(200,100,IgnoreAspect); markroutine marks() { return new void(picture pic=currentpicture, frame f, path g) { path p=scale(1mm)*unitcircle; for(int i=0; i <= length(g); ++i) { pair z=point(g,i); frame f; if(i % 4 == 0) { fill(f,p); add(pic,f,z); } else { if(z.y > 50) { pic.add(new void(frame F, transform t) { path q=shift(t*z)*p; unfill(F,q); draw(F,q); }); } else { draw(f,p); add(pic,f,z); } } } }; } pair[] f={(5,5),(40,20),(55,51),(90,30)}; draw(graph(f),marker(marks())); scale(true); xaxis("$x$",BottomTop,LeftTicks); yaxis("$y$",LeftRight,RightTicks);

import graph; size(9cm,8cm,IgnoreAspect); string data="westnile.csv"; file in=input(data).line().csv(); string[] columnlabel=in; real[][] A=in; A=transpose(A); real[] number=A[0], survival=A[1]; path g=graph(number,survival); draw(g); scale(true); xaxis("Initial no.\ of mosquitoes per bird ($S_{M_0}/N_{B_0}$)", Bottom,LeftTicks); xaxis(Top); yaxis("Susceptible bird survival",Left,RightTicks(trailingzero)); yaxis(Right); real a=number[0]; real b=number[number.length-1]; real S1=0.475; path h1=(a,S1)--(b,S1); real M1=interp(a,b,intersect(h1,g)[0]); real S2=0.9; path h2=(a,S2)--(b,S2); real M2=interp(a,b,intersect(h2,g)[0]); labelx("$M_1$",M1); labelx("$M_2$",M2); draw((a,S2)--(M2,S2)--(M2,0),Dotted); draw((a,S1)--(M1,S1)--(M1,0),dashed); pen p=fontsize(10pt); real y3=0.043; path reduction=(M1,y3)--(M2,y3); draw(reduction,Arrow,TrueMargin(0,0.5*(linewidth(Dotted)+linewidth()))); arrow(shift(-20,5)*Label(minipage("\flushleft{\begin{itemize}\item[1.]\nEstimate proportion of birds surviving at end of season\end{itemize}}",100), align=NNE), (M1,S1),NNE,1cm,p,Arrow(NoFill)); arrow(shift(-24,5)*Label(minipage("\flushleft{\begin{itemize}\item[2.]\nRead off initial mosquito abundance\end{itemize}}",80),align=NNE), (M1,0),NE,2cm,p,Arrow(NoFill)); arrow(shift(20,0)*Label(minipage("\flushleft{\begin{itemize}\item[3.]\nDetermine desired bird survival for next season\end{itemize}}",90),align=SW), (M2,S2),SW,arrowlength,p,Arrow(NoFill)); arrow(shift(8,-15)*Label(minipage("\flushleft{\begin{itemize}\item[4.]\nCalculate required proportional reduction in mosquitoes\end{itemize}}",90), align=NW), point(reduction,0.5),NW,1.5cm,p,Arrow(NoFill));

// example file for roundedpath() in roundedpath.asy // written by stefan knorr // import needed packages import roundedpath; // function definition picture CreateKOOS(real Scale, string legend) // draw labeled coordinate system as picture { picture ReturnPic; real S = 1.2*Scale; draw(ReturnPic, ((-S,0)--(S,0)), bar = EndArrow); // x axis draw(ReturnPic, ((0,-S)--(0,S)), bar = EndArrow); // y axis label(ReturnPic, "$\varepsilon$", (S,0), SW); // x axis label label(ReturnPic, "$\sigma$", (0,S), SW); // y axis label label(ReturnPic, legend, (0.7S, -S), NW); // add label 'legend' return ReturnPic; // return picture } // some global definitions real S = 13mm; // universal scale factor for the whole file real grad = 0.25; // gradient for lines real radius = 0.04; // radius for the rounded path' real lw = 2; // linewidth pair A = (-1, -1); // start point for graphs pair E = ( 1, 1); // end point for graphs path graph; // local graph pen ActPen; // actual pen for each drawing picture T[]; // vector of all four diagrams real inc = 2.8; // increment-offset for combining pictures //////////////////////////////////////// 1st diagram T[1] = CreateKOOS(S, "$T_1$"); // initialise T[1] as empty diagram with label $T_1$ graph = A; // # pointwise definition of current path 'graph' graph = graph -- (A.x + grad*1.6, A.y + 1.6); // # graph = graph -- (E.x - grad*0.4, E.y - 0.4); // # graph = graph -- E; // # graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round edges of 'graph' using roundedpath() in roundedpath.asy ActPen = rgb(0,0,0.6) + linewidth(lw); // define pen for drawing in 1st diagram draw(T[1], graph, ActPen); // draw 'graph' with 'ActPen' into 'T[1]' (1st hysteresis branch) draw(T[1], rotate(180,(0,0))*graph, ActPen); // draw rotated 'graph' (2nd hysteresis branch) graph = (0,0) -- (grad*0.6, 0.6) -- ( (grad*0.6, 0.6) + (0.1, 0) ); // define branch from origin to hysteresis graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round this path draw(T[1], graph, ActPen); // draw this path into 'T[1]' //////////////////////////////////////// 2nd diagram T[2] = CreateKOOS(S, "$T_2$"); // initialise T[2] as empty diagram with label $T_2$ graph = A; // # pointwise definition of current path 'graph' graph = graph -- (A.x + grad*1.3, A.y + 1.3); // # graph = graph -- (E.x - grad*0.7 , E.y - 0.7); // # graph = graph -- E; // # graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round edges of 'graph' using roundedpath() in roundedpath.asy ActPen = rgb(0.2,0,0.4) + linewidth(lw); // define pen for drawing in 2nd diagram draw(T[2], graph, ActPen); // draw 'graph' with 'ActPen' into 'T[2]' (1st hysteresis branch) draw(T[2], rotate(180,(0,0))*graph, ActPen); // draw rotated 'graph' (2nd hysteresis branch) graph = (0,0) -- (grad*0.3, 0.3) -- ( (grad*0.3, 0.3) + (0.1, 0) ); // define branch from origin to hysteresis graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round this path draw(T[2], graph, ActPen); // draw this path into 'T[2]' //////////////////////////////////////// 3rd diagram T[3] = CreateKOOS(S, "$T_3$"); // initialise T[3] as empty diagram with label $T_3$ graph = A; // # pointwise definition of current path 'graph' graph = graph -- (A.x + grad*0.7, A.y + 0.7); // # graph = graph -- ( - grad*0.3 , - 0.3); // # graph = graph -- (0,0); // # graph = graph -- (grad*0.6, 0.6); // # graph = graph -- (E.x - grad*0.4, E.y - 0.4); // # graph = graph -- E; // # graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round edges of 'graph' using roundedpath() in roundedpath.asy ActPen = rgb(0.6,0,0.2) + linewidth(lw); // define pen for drawing in 3rd diagram draw(T[3], graph, ActPen); // draw 'graph' with 'ActPen' into 'T[3]' (1st hysteresis branch) draw(T[3], rotate(180,(0,0))*graph, ActPen); // draw rotated 'graph' (2nd hysteresis branch) //////////////////////////////////////// 4th diagram T[4] = CreateKOOS(S, "$T_4$"); // initialise T[4] as empty diagram with label $T_4$ graph = A; // # pointwise definition of current path 'graph' graph = graph -- (A.x + grad*0.4, A.y + 0.4); // # graph = graph -- ( - grad*0.6 , - 0.6); // # graph = graph -- (0,0); // # graph = graph -- (grad*0.9, 0.9); // # graph = graph -- (E.x - grad*0.1, E.y - 0.1); // # graph = graph -- E; // # graph = roundedpath(graph, radius, S); // round edges of 'graph' using roundedpath() in roundedpath.asy ActPen = rgb(0.6,0,0) + linewidth(lw); // define pen for drawing in 4th diagram draw(T[4], graph, ActPen); // draw 'graph' with 'ActPen' into 'T[4]' (1st hysteresis branch) draw(T[4], rotate(180,(0,0))*graph, ActPen); // draw rotated 'graph' (3nd hysteresis branch) // add some labels and black dots to the first two pictures pair SWW = (-0.8, -0.6); label(T[1], "$\sigma_f$", (0, 0.6S), NE); // sigma_f draw(T[1], (0, 0.6S), linewidth(3) + black); label(T[2], "$\sigma_f$", (0, 0.3S), NE); // sigma_f draw(T[2], (0, 0.3S), linewidth(3) + black); label(T[1], "$\varepsilon_p$", (0.7S, 0), SWW); // epsilon_p draw(T[1], (0.75S, 0), linewidth(3) + black); label(T[2], "$\varepsilon_p$", (0.7S, 0), SWW); // epsilon_p draw(T[2], (0.75S, 0), linewidth(3) + black); // add all pictures T[1...4] to the current one add(T[1],(0,0)); add(T[2],(1*inc*S,0)); add(T[3],(2*inc*S,0)); add(T[4],(3*inc*S,0)); // draw line of constant \sigma and all intersection points with the graphs in T[1...4] ActPen = linewidth(1) + dashed + gray(0.5); // pen definition draw((-S, 0.45*S)--((3*inc+1)*S, 0.45*S), ActPen); // draw backgoundline label("$\sigma_s$", (-S, 0.45S), W); // label 'sigma_s' path mark = scale(2)*unitcircle; // define mark-symbol to be used for intersections ActPen = linewidth(1) + gray(0.5); // define pen for intersection mark draw(shift(( 1 - grad*0.55 + 0*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // # draw all intersections draw(shift((-1 + grad*1.45 + 0*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // # draw(shift(( 1 - grad*0.55 + 1*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // # draw(shift(( 1 - grad*0.55 + 2*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // # draw(shift(( grad*0.45 + 2*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // # draw(shift(( grad*0.45 + 3*inc)*S, 0.45*S)*mark, ActPen); // #

//cache 2598986832 import graph; // Set a wide canvas to ensure ticks and labels have room size(16cm, 3.0000000000000004cm); // Helper: base-10 logarithm (Asymptote only provides natural log) real log10(real x) { return log(x) / log(10); } // Define the range of exponents (10^1 to 10^9 covers 10 m/s up to 3x10^8 m/s) int minExp = 1; int maxExp = 9; // 1. Draw the axis and tick marks draw((minExp, 0) -- (maxExp, 0), linewidth(0.8)); for(int i = minExp; i <= maxExp; ++i) { // Major Ticks draw((i, -0.3) -- (i, 0.3), linewidth(0.8)); label("$10^{" + string(i) + "}$", (i, -0.6)); // Minor Ticks (2 through 9 for each order of magnitude) if(i < maxExp) { for(int j = 2; j <= 9; ++j) { real minor_x = i + log10(j); draw((minor_x, -0.15) -- (minor_x, 0.15), linewidth(0.4)); } } } // 2. Data for the speeds real[] speeds = {10.4, 29, 45, 85, 108, 250, 343, 1000, 7660, 30000, 299792458}; // 3. Plot the data points for(int i = 0; i < speeds.length; ++i) { // Find the horizontal position using the base-10 logarithm real point_x = log10(speeds[i]); // Draw a colored dot on the axis dot((point_x, 0), red+linewidth(5)); // Draw a small leader line pointing up to the label draw((point_x, 0) -- (point_x, 0.4), red+linewidth(0.6)); // Place label just above the leader line label(string(i+1), (point_x, 0.55), red+fontsize(10)); }

} real curve2(real t){ return 40*sin(214*pi*t); } pen graphpen1 = blue+linewidth(1.5 pt); pen graphpen2 = magenta+linewidth(1.5 pt); dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.1; real ymin = -60; real ymax = 60; real xTickSpacing = 0.01; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.005; real yTickSpacing = 20; real ySubtickSpacing = 10; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 16; real ysize = 8; real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = false; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); real killZero = 9805675997679076690980969.000123; axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; killZero = 0; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0); dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax,n=250), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax,n=250), p = graphpen2); } //---- COLOR-CODED FREQUENCY LEGEND ---- // Small colored line segment + label in upper left, white fill for readability draw((0.003,56)--(0.013,56), graphpen1); label(Label("$110\ \mathrm{Hz}$", p=blue+fontsize(12), filltype=Fill(p=white)), (0.014,56), E); draw((0.003,50)--(0.013,50), graphpen2); label(Label("$107\ \mathrm{Hz}$", p=magenta+fontsize(12), filltype=Fill(p=white)), (0.014,50), E);
Open in HiTeXeR

//------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } real curve1(real t){ return 40*sin(220*pi*t); } real curve2(real t){ return 40*sin(226*pi*t); } pen graphpen1 = blue+linewidth(1.5 pt); pen graphpen2 = orange+linewidth(1.5 pt); dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.1; real ymin = -60; real ymax = 60; real xTickSpacing = 0.01; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.005; real yTickSpacing = 20; real ySubtickSpacing = 10; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 16; real ysize = 8; real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = false; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); real killZero = 9805675997679076690980969.000123; axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; killZero = 0; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0); dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax,n=250), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax,n=250), p = graphpen2); } //---- COLOR-CODED FREQUENCY LEGEND ---- // Small colored line segment + label in upper left, white fill for readability draw((0.003,56)--(0.013,56), graphpen1); label(Label("$110\ \mathrm{Hz}$", p=blue+fontsize(12), filltype=Fill(p=white)), (0.014,56), E); draw((0.003,50)--(0.013,50), graphpen2); label(Label("$113\ \mathrm{Hz}$", p=orange+fontsize(12), filltype=Fill(p=white)), (0.014,50), E);

//Doppler Effect: Moving Source vs Moving Observer (percent units) //https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/wkgsdzuj //Comparison plot: both curves on the same axes, both passing through the origin. //Observer: Y = X (linear). Source: Y = 100*X / (100 - X) (hyperbolic; asymptote at X = 100). //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Speed (percent of wave speed)"; string yAxisLabel = "Frequency Change (percent of original)"; real xmin = -300; real xmax = 100; real ymin = -100; real ymax = 100; real xTickSpacing = 50; real xSubtickSpacing = 25; real yTickSpacing = 20; real ySubtickSpacing = 5; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 15; //in cm real ysize = 9; real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = .5; real ylabel_loc = .5; real labelSize = 12; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = false; bool xAxisRightArrow = false; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = false; bool yAxisDownArrow = false; bool forcexAxisAtZero = false; bool forceyAxisAtZero = false; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = false; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 10; bool controlDecimals = false; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 0; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = true; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); real killZero = 9805675997679076690980969.000123; axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; killZero = 0; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0); dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); //================== DOPPLER CURVES AND LABELS ================== // Moving observer (linear): Y = X real freqChangeObs(real vPercent) { return vPercent; } // Moving source (hyperbolic): Y = 100*X / (100 - X). // Plotted only to X = 50, where the curve exits the chart at exactly Y = 100. real freqChangeSrc(real vPercent) { return 100 * vPercent / (100 - vPercent); } // Draw both curves draw(graph(freqChangeObs, -100, xmax, n=2), deepcyan+1.5bp); draw(graph(freqChangeSrc, xmin, 50, n=200), heavymagenta+1.5bp); // Color-coded inline labels with white fill so gridlines don't cross through them label(Label("Moving Source", p = heavymagenta+fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white)), (30, 70)); label(Label("Moving Observer", p = deepcyan+fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white)), (70, 40)); // Black dot at origin marks the no-motion reference (neutral color since both curves pass through it) dot((0, 0), black+5bp);

//------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curves to draw real curve1(real x){ return 0.75*sin(400*pi*x); } real curve2(real x){ return 0.75*sin(500*pi*x); } real curve3(real x){ return 0.75*sin(400*pi*x)+0.75*sin(500*pi*x); } //style of graph lines pen graphpen1 = blue+linewidth(1pt); pen graphpen2 = red+linewidth(1pt); pen graphpen3 = deepgreen+linewidth(1.5pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (mm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.04; real ymin = -1.5; real ymax = 1.5; real xTickSpacing = 0.01; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.005; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 15; //in cm - wider as requested real ysize = 6; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = .5; real labelSize = 12; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = false; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = false; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 10; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 3; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = true; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ //for documentation, see https://asymptote.sourceforge.io/doc/graph.html if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); real killZero = 9805675997679076690980969.000123; axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; killZero = 0; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax, n=3000), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax, n=3000), p = graphpen2); } draw(graph(curve3, xmin, xmax, n=3000), p=graphpen3);

#22 — c539_L14_script_2.asy

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/lukbrnzb import graph; //------ PARAMETERS ----------------- // Time axis bounds (minutes from origin time) real tmin = 0; real tmax = 18; // Displacement axis bounds (arbitrary units) real ymin = -2; real ymax = 2; // Arrival times for an earthquake at 3000 km // (P at ~8.0 km/s, S at ~4.5 km/s, surface at ~3.5 km/s) real t_P = 6.0; real t_S = 11.0; real t_surf = 14.0; // Wave packet parameters: // f = oscillation frequency (cycles per minute) // sigma = half-width of Gaussian envelope (minutes) // A = relative amplitude real f_P = 5.0; real sigma_P = 0.5; real A_P = 0.25; real f_S = 2.5; real sigma_S = 1; real A_S = 0.6; real f_surf = 1.0; real sigma_surf = 1.5; real A_surf = .7; // Build the seismogram as the sum of three damped sinusoids real seismogram(real t){ real p = A_P * exp(-((t-t_P) /sigma_P)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_P *(t-t_P)); real s = A_S * exp(-((t-t_S) /sigma_S)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_S *(t-t_S)); real srf = A_surf * exp(-((t-t_surf)/sigma_surf)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_surf*(t-t_surf)); return p + s + srf; } //------ FIGURE SIZE ----------------- size(15cm, 6cm, IgnoreAspect); //------ TICK / AXIS SETUP ------------ real xTickSpacing = 2; real xSubtickSpacing = 1; real yTickSpacing = 1; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.5; // anchor dots so the graph package knows where the corners are dot((tmin, ymin), invisible); dot((tmax, ymax), invisible); Label xTickFormat = Label("%.0f", filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(10)); ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = xTickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = 3, Size = 6); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = " ", Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = 3, Size = 6); Label xLabel = Label("Time after earthquake (minutes)", position = 0.5, p = fontsize(12), filltype = Fill(p = white)); Label yLabel = Label("Displacement (mm)", position = 0.5, p = fontsize(12), filltype = Fill(p = white)); xaxis(xmin = tmin, xmax = tmax, L = xLabel, axis = BottomTop, arrow = None, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = LeftRight, arrow = None, ticks = yticks); // gridlines xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray)); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray)); xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray)); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray)); //------ ARRIVAL MARKERS -------------- pen arrivalPen = brown + linewidth(0.8pt) + dashed; draw((t_P-1, ymin)--(t_P-1, ymax), arrivalPen); draw((t_S-2, ymin)--(t_S-2, ymax), arrivalPen); draw((t_surf+3, ymin)--(t_surf+3, ymax), arrivalPen); //------ SEISMOGRAM CURVE ------------- draw(graph(seismogram, tmin, tmax, 2000), blue + linewidth(1.0pt));
Open in HiTeXeR

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/lukbrnzb import graph; //------ PARAMETERS ----------------- // Time axis bounds (minutes from origin time) real tmin = 0; real tmax = 18; // Displacement axis bounds (arbitrary units) real ymin = -2; real ymax = 2; // Arrival times for an earthquake at 3000 km // (P at ~8.0 km/s, S at ~4.5 km/s, surface at ~3.5 km/s) real t_P = 6.0; real t_S = 11.0; real t_surf = 14.0; // Wave packet parameters: // f = oscillation frequency (cycles per minute) // sigma = half-width of Gaussian envelope (minutes) // A = relative amplitude real f_P = 5.0; real sigma_P = 0.5; real A_P = 0.25; real f_S = 2.5; real sigma_S = 1; real A_S = 0.6; real f_surf = 1.0; real sigma_surf = 1.5; real A_surf = .7; // Build the seismogram as the sum of three damped sinusoids real seismogram(real t){ real p = A_P * exp(-((t-t_P) /sigma_P)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_P *(t-t_P)); real s = A_S * exp(-((t-t_S) /sigma_S)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_S *(t-t_S)); real srf = A_surf * exp(-((t-t_surf)/sigma_surf)^2) * sin(2*pi*f_surf*(t-t_surf)); return p + s + srf; } //------ FIGURE SIZE ----------------- size(15cm, 6cm, IgnoreAspect); //------ TICK / AXIS SETUP ------------ real xTickSpacing = 2; real xSubtickSpacing = 1; real yTickSpacing = 1; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.5; // anchor dots so the graph package knows where the corners are dot((tmin, ymin), invisible); dot((tmax, ymax), invisible); Label xTickFormat = Label("%.0f", filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(10)); ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = xTickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = 3, Size = 6); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = " ", Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = 3, Size = 6); Label xLabel = Label("Time after earthquake (minutes)", position = 0.5, p = fontsize(12), filltype = Fill(p = white)); Label yLabel = Label("Displacement (mm)", position = 0.5, p = fontsize(12), filltype = Fill(p = white)); xaxis(xmin = tmin, xmax = tmax, L = xLabel, axis = BottomTop, arrow = None, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = LeftRight, arrow = None, ticks = yticks); // gridlines xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray)); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray)); xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray)); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray)); //------ ARRIVAL MARKERS -------------- pen arrivalPen = brown + linewidth(0.8pt) + dashed; draw((t_P-1, ymin)--(t_P-1, ymax), arrivalPen); draw((t_S-2, ymin)--(t_S-2, ymax), arrivalPen); draw((t_surf+3, ymin)--(t_surf+3, ymax), arrivalPen); //------ SEISMOGRAM CURVE ------------- draw(graph(seismogram, tmin, tmax, 2000), blue + linewidth(1.0pt)); label("$P$-waves", (t_P-1, ymax + 0.45), fontsize(11) + black); label("$S$-waves", (t_S-2, ymax + 0.45), fontsize(11) + black); label("Surface waves", (t_surf, ymax + 0.45), fontsize(9) + black);
Open in HiTeXeR

import graph; unitsize(1 cm); draw((-2.5,0)--(2.5,0),Arrows); draw((0,-2.5)--(0,2.5),Arrows); for(int i = 0; i <= 5; ++i) { draw(2*dir(30 + 60*i)--2*dir(30 + 60*(i + 1)) ); } label("Re", (2.5,0), NE); label("Im", (0,2.5), NE); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{\pi}{6}$", 2*dir(30), NE); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{3 \pi}{6}$", 2*dir(90), NE); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{5 \pi}{6}$", 2*dir(150), NW); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{7 \pi}{6}$", 2*dir(210), SW); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{9 \pi}{6}$", 2*dir(270), SE); dot("$2 \: \mbox{cis} \: \frac{11 \pi}{6}$", 2*dir(330), SE);

real margin=1.5mm; object left=align(object("$x^2$",ellipse,margin),W); add(left); object right=align(object("$\sin x$",ellipse,margin),4E); add(right); add(new void(frame f, transform t) { draw(f,point(left,NE,t)--point(right,W,t)); });

HiTeXeR

AoPS TeXeR

Source

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/memiohka //------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve(real t){ return sin(2*pi*20*t); //20Hz } //style of graph line pen graphpen = blue+linewidth(1.5pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (cm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.2; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.05; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.01; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- // Draw the background rectangle to the main picture first filldraw(box((0.05,-1),(0.1,1)), lightgreen, invisible); // Create a foreground picture for the axes picture fg; xaxis(fg, xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(fg, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); add(fg); // Add foreground on top if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen);}
Open in HiTeXeR

real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve(real t){ return sin(2*pi*20*t); //20Hz } //style of graph line pen graphpen = mediumblue+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (cm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.2; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.05; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.01; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- // Draw the background rectangle to the main picture first filldraw(box((0.088,-1),(0.138,1)), lightgreen, invisible); // Create a foreground picture for the axes picture fg; xaxis(fg, xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(fg, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); add(fg); // Add foreground on top if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen);}

bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- // Draw the background rectangle to the main picture first filldraw(box((0.062,-1),(0.112,1)), lightgreen, invisible); // Create a foreground picture for the axes picture fg; xaxis(fg, xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(fg, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); add(fg); // Add foreground on top if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen);}

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/memiohka //------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve(real t){ return sin(2*pi*20*t); //20Hz } //style of graph line pen graphpen = blue+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (cm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.2; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.05; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.01; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen);}

pen graphpen2 = mediumred+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (cm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.2; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.05; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.01; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax, n=500), p = graphpen2); } label("Lower Pitch", (0.035,1),N,blue+fontsize(14)); label("Higher Pitch", (0.05,-1),S,red+fontsize(14));

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/ohgvesgz //------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve1(real t){ return 0.5*sin(2*pi*415*t)+0.5*sin(2*pi*830*t); //Femi } real curve2(real t){ return 1.25*(0.5*sin(2*pi*415*t)+0.5*sin(2*pi*830*t)); //Louder } //style of graph line pen graphpen1 = mediumblue+linewidth(1.5 pt); pen graphpen2 = mediumred+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (mm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.005; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.001; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.0005; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 3; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = false; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} draw((xmin,0.9)--(xmax,0.9),mediumblue+dashed+linewidth(1)); draw((xmin,1.1)--(xmax,1.1),mediumred+dashed+linewidth(1)); if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen2); ;} label("Softer Sound",(0.0015,0.75),blue+fontsize(12)); label("Louder Sound",(0.0015,1.25),red+fontsize(12));

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/cnswrpmr //------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve1(real t){ return sin(2*pi*80*t); //80Hz } //style of graph line pen graphpen1 = blue+linewidth(1.5 pt); pen graphpen2 = magenta+linewidth(2.0 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Mic. Displacement (mm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.03; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.01; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.005; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax,n=100), p = graphpen1); }

//https://artofproblemsolving.com/texer/cnswrpmr //------ DATA ----------------- bool plotPoints = false; bool plotCurve = true; real[] xdata = {}; real x_transform(real x){ return x; } real[] ydata = {}; real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve1(real t){ return sin(2*pi*80*t); //80Hz } real curve2(real t){ return sin(2*pi*80*(t-0.0029)); //80Hz } //style of graph line pen graphpen1 = mediumblue+linewidth(1.5 pt); pen graphpen2 = mediumred+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Time (s)"; string yAxisLabel = "Mic. Displacement (mm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.03; real ymin = -1.2; real ymax = 1.2; real xTickSpacing = 0.01; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.005; real yTickSpacing = 0.5; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.25; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = NE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax,n=100), p = graphpen1); draw(graph(curve2, xmin, xmax,n=100), p = graphpen2); } label("Near", (0.003,1),N,blue+fontsize(14)); label("Far", (0.006,1),N,red+fontsize(14)); draw((0.0031,1)--(0.0031,-1.1),gray+dashed+linewidth(1.5)); draw((0.006,1)--(0.006,-1.1),gray+dashed+linewidth(1.5)); label("0.0029 s",(0.0045,-1.15),S,brown+fontsize(14)); draw((0.0031,-1.1)--(0.006,-1.1),brown+dotted+linewidth(1),arrow=Arrows(4));

real y_transform(real y){ return y; } //define what curve to draw real curve1(real t){ return 0.05*sin(32.2*t); } //style of graph line pen graphpen1 = blue+linewidth(1.5 pt); //style of dots dotfactor = 10; pen dotpen = blue; filltype dotfill = Fill; //-------ESSENTIAL OPTIONS------------ string xAxisLabel = "Distance (cm)"; string yAxisLabel = "Displacement (mm)"; real xmin = 0; real xmax = 0.5; real ymin = -.12; real ymax = .12; real xTickSpacing = 0.1; real xSubtickSpacing = 0.05; real yTickSpacing = 0.1; real ySubtickSpacing = 0.00; //-------------ENTIRE IMAGE------------ real xsize = 14; //in cm real ysize = 8; //next line only used if you also set "equalAxisRatio" to "true" in the "AXES" section real overallSize = 30; //----------- LABEL OPTIONS --------------- real xlabel_loc = 1; real ylabel_loc = 0.5; real labelSize = 14; //------------ AXES ---------- bool equalAxisRatio = false; bool fourSides = true; bool xAxisRightArrow = true; bool xAxisLeftArrow = false; bool yAxisUpArrow = true; bool yAxisDownArrow = true; bool forcexAxisAtZero = true; bool forceyAxisAtZero = true; //----------- TICK MARKS ---------------- bool showTicks = true; bool ticksGoThroughAxes = true; real tickSize = 6; real subtickSize = 3; // ----------- NUMBERING ON AXES ----------- bool axisNumbers = true; real numberSize = 11; bool controlDecimals = true; bool trailingZeros = false; int numDecimalPoints = 2; //------------ GRID ------------------- bool bigGrid = true; bool smallGrid = false; //------------ TITLE ----------- string title = ""; real titleSize = 16; //--------BELOW HERE YOU USUALLY DON'T NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING------------------------ if(equalAxisRatio){ unitsize(overallSize); } else{ size(xsize*72/2.54, ysize*72/2.54, IgnoreAspect); } import graph; arrowbar xarrow = None; if(xAxisRightArrow && xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(xAxisRightArrow){ xarrow = EndArrow; } if(xAxisLeftArrow){ xarrow = BeginArrow; } } arrowbar yarrow = None; if(yAxisUpArrow && yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = Arrows; } else{ if(yAxisUpArrow){ yarrow = EndArrow; } if(yAxisDownArrow){ yarrow = BeginArrow; } } Label xLabel = Label(s = xAxisLabel, position = xlabel_loc, align = SE, p = fontsize(labelSize), filltype = Fill(p = white) ); Label yLabel = Label(s = yAxisLabel, position = ylabel_loc, p = fontsize(labelSize),filltype = Fill(p = white) ); axis xAxisType = Bottom; axis yAxisType = Left; if(fourSides){ xAxisType = BottomTop; yAxisType = LeftRight; } if(forcexAxisAtZero){ xAxisType = YZero; } if(forceyAxisAtZero){ yAxisType = XZero; } Label tickFormat = Label(" "); string decimalString = ""; if(controlDecimals){ if(trailingZeros){ decimalString = "%#." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } else{ decimalString = "%." + string(numDecimalPoints) + "f"; } } if(axisNumbers){ tickFormat = Label(decimalString, filltype = Fill(p = white), p = fontsize(numberSize) ); } if(!showTicks){ subtickSize = -1; tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen1); } draw((.245,.05)--(.435,.05),brown+dotted+linewidth(2),Arrows(5)); label("$\lambda = 1.95\;\mathrm{mm}$",(0.335,.05),N,brown+fontsize(14));

tickSize = -1; } ticks xticks = LeftTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = xTickSpacing, step = xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); ticks yticks = RightTicks(format = tickFormat, Step = yTickSpacing, step = ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize ); if(ticksGoThroughAxes){ xticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, xTickSpacing, xSubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); yticks = Ticks(format = tickFormat, yTickSpacing, ySubtickSpacing, size = subtickSize, Size = tickSize); } dot((xmin,ymin), black+0);// so the graph package knows where to place the top and bottom x axes dot((xmax,ymax),black+0); //----------------DO THE DRAWING---------------- xaxis(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, L = xLabel, axis = xAxisType, arrow = xarrow, ticks = xticks); yaxis(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, L = yLabel, axis = yAxisType, arrow = yarrow, ticks = yticks); if(bigGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = yTickSpacing, extend = true, gray) ); } if(smallGrid){ xaxis(LeftRight, invisible, Ticks(Step = xSubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); yaxis(BottomTop, invisible, Ticks(Step = ySubtickSpacing, extend = true, lightgray) ); } label(title, (xmax/2 + xmin/2, ymax),N, fontsize(titleSize)); real[] x_to_plot = map(x_transform, xdata); real[] y_to_plot = map(y_transform, ydata); if(plotPoints){ for(int i = 0; i< xdata.length; ++i){ dot((x_to_plot[i], y_to_plot[i]), filltype = dotfill, p = dotpen); }} if(plotCurve){ draw(graph(curve1, xmin, xmax), p = graphpen1); } draw((.245,.05)--(.435,.05),brown+dotted+linewidth(2),Arrows(5)); label("$\lambda$",(0.335,.05),N,brown+fontsize(14));
